name: a8_sandbox_kernel
outcome_goal: Every RuntimeBoundaryError raise is inside runtime/sandbox_runtime.py; execution_backends.py and execution_policy.py only assemble payloads.
verify_command: bash -lc "PYTHONPATH='Code&DBs/Workflow' /opt/homebrew/bin/python3 -m pytest --noconftest -q 'Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/' -k sandbox && bad=$(rg 'raise RuntimeBoundaryError' 'Code&DBs/Workflow' --type py -l | grep -v 'runtime/sandbox_runtime.py' || true); test -z \"$bad\""

jobs.label: a8_sandbox_kernel
jobs.prompt: On branch praxis/kernel-sandbox, consolidate RuntimeBoundaryError authority into Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/sandbox_runtime.py. Touched scope: Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/sandbox_runtime.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/workflow/execution_backends.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/workflow/execution_policy.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/adapters/docker_runner.py. execution_backends.py and execution_policy.py may assemble payloads only. Respect Docker-only sandbox authority; do not add host-local execution lanes. File decision.2026-04-20.kernel-sandbox-consolidation. Verify grep plus sandbox tests. Open a PR to public referencing the decision row; do not merge if verifier is red.
jobs.verify_command: bash -lc "PYTHONPATH='Code&DBs/Workflow' /opt/homebrew/bin/python3 -m pytest --noconftest -q 'Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/' -k sandbox && bad=$(rg 'raise RuntimeBoundaryError' 'Code&DBs/Workflow' --type py -l | grep -v 'runtime/sandbox_runtime.py' || true); test -z \"$bad\""
